code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut cur = 0
mut neg = false
mut in_num = false
mut sum = 0
mut out = ""
mut first = true

while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  let b = if is_end
    32
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
  end

  let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57

  if is_digit
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    neg = true
    in_num = true
  else
    if in_num
      let val = if neg
        0 - cur
      else
        cur
      end
      sum = sum + val
      if first
        out = "#{sum}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{sum}"
      end
      cur = 0
      neg = false
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(out)
